0: In order to encourage Hunters to jump to action and
improve solidarity, we have produced a [Color:0x5]promotional
animation[Color:0x0] based on you, [Flynn]. Before 
we release it, we would like you to take a look at
it. By accepting this quest, you will be able to
view the video. [Color:0x5]Please let us know what you think[Color:0x0].
[END]
